title: Elytra and Rocket Toggle
description: Toggle elytra and rockets per dimension. Configure with /elytra-toggle.
body:
# Elytra Toggle

Toggle elytra and rockets per dimension. Configure with /elytra-toggle.

### Basic usage:

`/elytra-toggle help`

runs the help command

`/elytra-toggle levels`

get all valid levels and their state.

`/elytra-toggle elytra {true/false} "name:dimension"`

enable/disable elytra for a level.

`/elytra-toggle rocket {true/false} "name:dimension"`

enable/disable rockets for a level.

### Example:

`/elytra-toggle levels`

```
Levels:
minecraft:overworld
minecraft:the_nether - rockets disabled
minecraft:the_end - elytra disabled
```

`/elytra-toggle elytra false "minecraft:overworld"`

`/elytra-toggle rocket true "minecraft:the_nether"`

`/elytra-toggle elytra true "minecraft:the_end"`

`/elytra-toggle rocket false "minecraft:the_end"`

`/elytra-toggle levels`

```
Levels:
minecraft:overworld - elytra disabled
minecraft:the_nether
minecraft:the_end - rockets disabled
```
